metadata.title: ExecutionTask — single validated step in an execution plan

description: A single validated step in an execution plan (src/shared/models/execution_models.py). Pydantic BaseModel. task_type is a bare str validated at runtime by a Pydantic field_validator against _ALLOWED_TASK_TYPES, which is sourced from .intent/enforcement/config/task_type_phases.yaml (ADR-004). VOCABULARY DISCREPANCY: TaskStructure.task_type (same module) uses the TaskType str-Enum with 12 values; ExecutionTask.task_type uses a bare str validated against a YAML config. Two surfaces for the same concept — governor decision required to reconcile. params is typed as TaskParams (nested Pydantic model: file_path, code, symbol_name, justification, tag — all optional). Authority: ADR-056 Wave 2 Session 1.

step.description: Human-readable description of this execution step.

action.description: The action to perform at this step (e.g., action_id or operation name).

params.description: TaskParams — typed parameter object: file_path, code, symbol_name, justification, tag (all str | None). Governed by TaskParams Pydantic model.

task_type.description: Task type classifier. Default 'code_generation'. Runtime-validated by field_validator against _ALLOWED_TASK_TYPES from task_type_phases.yaml (ADR-004). VOCABULARY DISCREPANCY with TaskStructure.task_type (TaskType enum, 12 values) — governor decision required.
